name: edu.cornell.xrc.toolkit.core
description: A collection of starter assets and core utility scripts used across XRC Toolkit packages.

samples.description: A simple scene showcasing the use of the XRC Starter Assets. Useful items such as scenes and prefabs can be found in this sample.
Utilities for AR Foundation including input actions, prefabs, scenes, and scripts. This can be used to cleanly add AR Foundation Passthrough capabilities to a scene.
Utilities for XR Hands including prefabs, scenes, and scripts. This can be used to cleanly add XR Hands to a scene.
